mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_no, TO_CHAR(production_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS production_date, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, machine_no, category, customer_nm, site_nm, location, thickness, product_type, material_nm, quantity, area, options, completed_quantity, completed_area, defect_quantity, defect_area, pending_quantity, pending_area, shipping_date, unit_price, amount, plan_status, remarks, work_request_no, TO_CHAR(planned_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_start_date, TO_CHAR(planned_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_end_date, site_cd FROM production_plan WHERE start_date <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND end_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY machine_no, start_date, id

SELECT id, plan_no, TO_CHAR(production_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS production_date, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, machine_no, category, customer_nm, site_nm, location, thickness, product_type, material_nm, quantity, area, options, completed_quantity, completed_area, defect_quantity, defect_area, pending_quantity, pending_area, shipping_date, unit_price, amount, plan_status, remarks, work_request_no, TO_CHAR(planned_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_start_date, TO_CHAR(planned_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_end_date, site_cd FROM production_plan WHERE site_nm = #{siteNm} ORDER BY start_date DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, plan_no, TO_CHAR(production_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS production_date, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, machine_no, category, customer_nm, site_nm, location, thickness, product_type, material_nm, quantity, area, options, completed_quantity, completed_area, defect_quantity, defect_area, pending_quantity, pending_area, shipping_date, unit_price, amount, plan_status, remarks, work_request_no, TO_CHAR(planned_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_start_date, TO_CHAR(planned_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_end_date, site_cd FROM production_plan WHERE plan_status IN ('REGISTERED', 'IN_PROGRESS') ORDER BY site_nm, start_date, id

SELECT id, plan_no, TO_CHAR(production_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS production_date, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, machine_no, category, customer_nm, site_nm, location, thickness, product_type, material_nm, quantity, area, options, completed_quantity, completed_area, defect_quantity, defect_area, pending_quantity, pending_area, shipping_date, unit_price, amount, plan_status, remarks, work_request_no, TO_CHAR(planned_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_start_date, TO_CHAR(planned_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS planned_end_date, site_cd FROM production_plan WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE production_plan SET start_date = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), machine_no = #{machineNo}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_plan ( plan_no, production_date, start_date, end_date, machine_no, category, customer_nm, site_nm, site_cd, location, thickness, product_type, material_nm, quantity, area, options, plan_status, remarks, work_request_no, planned_start_date, planned_end_date ) VALUES ( #{planNo}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{machineNo}, #{category}, #{customerNm}, #{siteNm}, #{siteCd}, #{location}, #{thickness}, #{productType}, #{materialNm}, #{quantity}, #{area}, #{options}, COALESCE(#{planStatus}, 'REGISTERED'), #{remarks}, #{workRequestNo}, TO_DATE(#{plannedStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{plannedEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
INSERT INTO production_plan_order_detail (plan_id, detail_id, assigned_quantity) VALUES (#{planId}, #{detailId}, #{assignedQuantity})

INSERT INTO production_plan_detail ( plan_id, order_detail_id, order_no, line_seq, material_cd, material_nm, product_category, width, height, thickness, unit_type, quantity, area, unit, unit_price, amount, dong, ho, floor, window_type, location_detail, delivery_date, remarks, process_status ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{orderDetailId}, #{orderNo}, #{lineSeq}, #{materialCd}, #{materialNm}, #{productCategory}, #{width}, #{height}, #{thickness}, #{unitType}, #{quantity}, #{area}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{dong}, #{ho}, #{floor}, #{windowType}, #{locationDetail}, TO_DATE(#{deliveryDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{remarks}, 'PENDING' )
